changes: Discovery revision: aligned LEDGER with the accepted Hermes boundary; added provider-neutral multi-evidence lineage, append-only reconciliation and correction, deterministic match safety, statement-only and coverage-exception workflows, optional payment-instrument/cardholder attribution, first-class spend pools, exact pool/category conservation, updated privacy/recovery/idempotency boundaries, three pre-mortem risks, three feasibility questions, six use cases, and three acceptance metrics. Existing PRD, design, and plan are intentionally stale pending the revised pipeline.
